content.en:
Standing in the main hall of the barren tower, Ye Tian looked around.

From Jian Gu's mouth, he knew that the Deserted Tower did not have a machine spirit, which was also a piece of information known to the public.

Without the guidance of the machine spirit, Ye Tian could only find the opportunity of the barren tower by himself.

Soon, he saw a stone monument.

There are some words on the stone tablet, these words are very ancient words, Ye Tian has never seen them, but they can be understood.

"Deserted Tower!"

Ye Tian saw that the Desolate Tower and the Desolate Realm were mentioned above, and it was obvious that the name of the Desolate Tower and the Desolate Realm came from this stone tablet.

The stone tablet introduced the situation of the Desolate Tower and the Desolate Realm, but the information introduced made Ye Tian extremely surprised.

"The Wasteland is not a world !!!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had always thought that the Wasteland was a world, and I am afraid that many people in the outside world thought so too.

As for whether the Supremes knew a little bit of information, he didn't know very well.

But now, from this stone tablet, Ye Tian knew the situation in the wasteland.

The Wasteland is actually a space storage equipment that surpasses the Supreme Treasure level, with many special abilities, and even the origin of the world.

It can be regarded as the treasure of the world, although it has no direct attack power, but its defensive ability surpasses the most terrifying defense supreme treasure, and even the most powerful supreme cannot shatter the desolate world.

"No wonder even the Protoss and the Demon Race can't help the Desolate Realm, if they can destroy the Desolate Realm, they are also willing to destroy the Desolate Realm, after all, without the Desolate Realm, the combat power of those innate gods in the Desolate Realm has dropped by a notch, which is equivalent to an ordinary cosmic clan!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

In addition, the Wasteland is not a product of this universe, but was born at the hands of the Innate Wasteland.

As for what the Congenital Desolate Clan was, Ye Tian didn't know, but he guessed that the Innate Desolate Clan should be a race that used to be in a certain cosmic era, and like other eras, it had already died out in the Great Destruction of the Universe.

And the Wasteland is the only treasure they left behind, and it has been passed down to this day.

The Deserted Tower was also mentioned above!

The Desolate Tower is a powerful treasure, although it is not as good as the Desolate Realm, but it has inherited the countless opportunities left by the innate Desolate Clan.

Other than that.

The Desolate Tower only allows the innate beings of the Desolate Realm to enter it, because the Innate Desolate Clan is a clan of innate beings, and the acquired beings are not allowed to enter, which is also to prevent the opportunity of the Innate Beings from being obtained by people from the outside world.

"No wonder, the desolate tower is actually an opportunity prepared for those innate gods, but the innate desolate clan didn't expect that the innate gods of this generation of the desolate world actually had innate gods to create desolate demons, and the desolate clan can also mobilize the power of the desolate world, which is equivalent to having the ability of innate beings, causing the desolate tower to mistakenly think that the desolate demon is also an innate deity. And I, an acquired being, also have the ability to copy, and by copying the talent of the desolate pattern, I can also mobilize the power of the desolate world. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

It can be said that this is also a loophole in the Wild Tower.

In addition, the stele also mentions that the fate of the barren tower needs to rely on potential and combat power, the lower the cultivation, the higher the potential, if the supremes come here, the potential will be almost exhausted, then it is difficult to get too good a chance.

This is also the reason why the Desolate Demon Clan has made the galaxy-level Desolate Demon and the Galaxy-level Desolate Demon must accumulate enough before entering the Desolate Tower, otherwise the opportunity will be wasted.

This stele is actually also an entrance, an entrance to the assessment.

Ye Tian put his hands on the stone stele, mobilized that trace of the origin of the desolate realm, and integrated it into the stone stele.

Bang!!!!

The stele vibrated and slowly presented a spatial entrance.

Swish!

Ye Tian walked into the entrance of this space and came to the depths of the barren tower.

In the inexplicable space.

A ray of light shone on Ye Tian's body, as if it was testing something.

Soon, a few minutes passed.

An illusory light curtain appeared in front of Ye Tian, with a line of words written on it.

"Potential: Supreme!"

Ye Tian didn't know much about the division of potential in the Wasteland Tower, but the supreme potential was definitely very high, and it could even be the highest potential.

Ye Tian has always been very confident in his potential.

After the potential test was over, another portal appeared.

Immediately, Ye Tian entered this portal and came to a piece of land.

Boom Boom Boom !!

A savage aura surged in.

Then, Ye Tian saw a huge divine elephant, stepping on the earth, with every step, the earth shook, and the endless law of earth rippled between heaven and earth.

Its breath suppressed the heavens and the earth, like a hell-suppressing god from hell, crushing all worlds.

"It's so strong!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Of course.

What he said about being strong refers to the great god level, because this god elephant only has a great god level cultivation, and the cultivation is not strong, but the combat power of the same level is absolutely terrifying.

In other words, even if it was a desolate demon clan, it would be extremely difficult to defeat this god statue at the galaxy-level peak realm, because Ye Tian found that in this space, he could not mobilize the power of the desolate realm, and could only rely on his own combat power.

Rumble!

The divine elephant had already attacked towards Ye Tian, and an elephant's foot crushed it, as if the sky had collapsed.

"Slash!"

Ye Tian didn't even take out the knife, instead of the knife with one hand, he slashed at it with a hand.

Poof!

This divine statue was directly split in half by Ye Tian and dissipated between heaven and earth.

Then, the second divine elephant came, and his cultivation was promoted to the first order of the galaxy level, but he was still easily killed by Ye Tian.

One after another divine elephants came to assess Ye Tian's combat power, and soon the galaxy-level peak divine elephants appeared.

But in the face of Ye Tian, this level of divine elephant is still not qualified.

"Slash!"

Ye Tian once again slashed the divine elephant.

Rumble!!!!

Another divine elephant descended, and this time it was a first-order divine elephant of the galaxy level, and its strength skyrocketed many times.

But this divine elephant still couldn't beat Ye Tian, and was completely crushed by Ye Tian.

Second Order of the Galaxy Level!

The third order of the galaxy level!

Fourth Order of the Galaxy Level!

With the improvement of the cultivation of the Divine Elephant and the improvement of his combat power, Ye Tian gradually became a little serious.

Finally.

A galaxy-level pinnacle god elephant appeared, and its combat power shocked Ye Tiandu, and he took out all his combat power to fight with it, and this battle lasted for a long time.

In terms of attack power, this divine elephant is not as good as Ye Tian, but the defensive power is too terrifying, and it is a little difficult for Ye Tian to completely damage this divine elephant.

In a flash, half a day passed.

In countless encounters, Ye Tian finally relied on his long-lasting combat ability to exhaust the power of this idol before killing it.

"The next time it will appear should be a god of the Cosmic God Realm, I'm definitely not an opponent!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Suddenly.

The sky darkened, and a huge elephant's foot crushed it, and Ye Tian's full force did not leave any scars on this elephant's foot.

Bang!!!

Heaven and earth changed, and Ye Tian found that he had been moved to another place.

He, the assessment is over!

Obviously, he failed to defeat the Divine Elephant of the Cosmic God Realm, and was deemed to have failed and moved away.

Then.

Ye Tian returned to the stele again, the assessment that belonged to him was over, and the reward that belonged to him should be coming!
